_comment: Scale-gate thresholds for tools/bot_swarm/scale_gate.py (issue #520). Single source of truth for the gate numbers. See docs/load-testing.md.

pr._comment: Deterministic PR tier: only machine-independent metrics are hard-gated (bandwidth + admission + KB/s baseline). tick-Hz is a total-collapse tripwire; tick-ms is advisory (0 = disabled) because the client-side proxy and CPU timing are noisy on shared runners.

reference._comment: Strict tier for the 8-core/16GB reference instance (or a self-hosted runner via --strict). tick-ms p99 enforced there; advisory on hosted runners.

soak._comment: 2 h soak-stability run. Same strict thresholds; the runner's RSS sampler feeds the leak check.

entity-scale._comment: Entity-pool + SpatialIndex scaling characterisation (#573). Sweeps entity count x sim worker count via FL_TEST_SPAWN_AI / FL_SIM_WORKER_THREADS, driven from the [world] load-spawn affordance. Advisory only (baselined=false): reads server_tick.entities + tick p99 into the summary but never gates the committed KB/s baseline. Reference-tier (nightly / workflow_dispatch) — needs the 8-core reference box for meaningful CPU timing.
